findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 37. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The HTML adds table column headers 'Time', 'Topic', and 'Presenter' that do not exist in the source PDF. The PDF presents the agenda as a simple list format without any table headers.
findings.evidence: HTML contains <thead> with <th>Time</th><th>Topic</th><th>Presenter</th>. The PDF has no such column headers; it presents agenda items as dotted-line entries.
